steps.title: Use the sharpening contrast
steps.content: "Although" sets up a contrast between earlier knowledge and recent analyses. Because the analyses have sharpened the picture, the earlier knowledge must have been unclear or hazy.

steps.title: Reject clarity and novelty
steps.content: B means complex or detailed, not unclear. C means never seen before, which does not contrast with being sharpened. D means definite or clear, the opposite of what the sentence needs for the earlier state. The answer is A.
